_comment: Cursor IDE hook mapping reference. Configure hooks in Cursor Settings > Hooks.
_note: Cursor hooks fire at different lifecycle points than Claude Code. See docs/cursor-setup.md for details.

afterFileEdit.note: Post-hoc scope warning — Cursor fires AFTER the edit (not before). Cannot prevent out-of-scope edits, only warn.

beforeShellExecution.note: Blocks dangerous commands before shell execution. Direct equivalent of Claude Code's PreToolUse Bash hook.
